definition: Belonging to them.
sentence_context: The children took their shoes off.

definition: In that place.
sentence_context: Please put the box over there.

definition: The state of the atmosphere at a place and time.
sentence_context: The weather is very sunny today.

definition: The head of a school.
sentence_context: The principal gave a speech at assembly.

definition: A fundamental truth or proposition.
sentence_context: It is the principle of the matter that counts.

definition: The time when it is dark outside.
sentence_context: The stars come out at night.

definition: A soldier in armor from long ago.
sentence_context: The knight fought the dragon.

definition: Past tense of win.
sentence_context: Our team won the game yesterday.

definition: The number after zero.
sentence_context: I have one apple in my bag.

definition: The colorful part of a plant.
sentence_context: The bee landed on the flower.

definition: Powder used for baking.
sentence_context: We need two cups of flour for the bread.

definition: The color of the sky.
sentence_context: She wore a bright blue dress.

definition: Past tense of blow.
sentence_context: The wind blew the leaves away.

definition: A large, heavy animal.
sentence_context: A grizzly bear lives in the woods.

definition: Not covered; naked.
sentence_context: He walked on the sand with bare feet.

definition: Past tense of hear.
sentence_context: I heard a strange noise in the garden.

definition: A large group of animals that live together.
sentence_context: A herd of elephants crossed the river.

definition: A distinctive smell.
sentence_context: The scent of roses filled the air.

definition: Past tense of send.
sentence_context: I sent a postcard from my vacation.

definition: A passage between rows of seats.
sentence_context: Walk down the aisle to find your seat.

definition: Expressing a doubt or choice between alternatives.
sentence_context: I do not know whether to go or stay.

definition: A grain used for food.
sentence_context: I eat cereal for breakfast.

definition: Consisting of or forming a series.
sentence_context: The detective tracked the serial thief.

definition: Rough or loose in texture or grain.
sentence_context: The sand felt coarse against my skin.

definition: An area of land set aside for racing or golf.
sentence_context: The golf course was very green.

definition: An advisory, deliberative, or legislative body of people.
sentence_context: The city council made a new law.

definition: Advice, especially that given formally.
sentence_context: He sought counsel from his teacher.

definition: Consisting of two parts, elements, or aspects.
sentence_context: The car has a dual exhaust system.

definition: A contest with deadly weapons between two people.
sentence_context: The knights fought a duel.

definition: To reduce something to small shreds by rubbing it on a grater.
sentence_context: Can you grate the cheese?

definition: Of an extent, amount, or intensity considerably above the normal or average.
sentence_context: You did a great job!

definition: Any of the fine threadlike strands growing from the skin of mammals.
sentence_context: She has long brown hair.

definition: A fast-running, long-eared mammal that resembles a large rabbit.
sentence_context: The hare ran across the field.

definition: Cause a wound or injury to become sound or healthy again.
sentence_context: The cut will take time to heal.

definition: The back part of the human foot below the ankle.
sentence_context: I have a blister on my heel.

definition: A hollow place in a solid body or surface.
sentence_context: There is a hole in my sock.

definition: All of; entire.
sentence_context: I ate the whole apple.

definition: A period of time equal to sixty minutes.
sentence_context: We will be there in an hour.

definition: Belonging to or associated with the speaker and one or more other people.
sentence_context: This is our house.

definition: Not active or in use.
sentence_context: The engine was left idle.
